headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Says Tokenized Stocks Could Open US Markets To 4 Billion Unbrokered People
Trump-Backed Gaza Board Draft Would Shield Officials From Arrest, Legal Proceedings: Report
summary: Leaked draft shows Trump-backed Board of Peace may seek sweeping legal immunity in Gaza reconstruction, raising major accountability concerns.

headline: Trump Warns Iran 'Will No Longer Exist' If Ceasefire Violations Continue
summary: President Donald Trump warned on social media that Iran could face total destruction if it continues violating ceasefire agreement.

headline: Nobel Economist Robert Shiller Warns AI Job Loss Fears Could Become A Self-Fulfilling Prophecy
summary: Robert Shiller warned fear of AI driven job losses could inflict greater economic damage than the technology itself.

headline: Scott Wiener Says He Was 'Harassed, Threatened And Physically Intimidated' At Two San Francisco Events
summary: Scott Wiener says he was harassed and physically intimidated at a San Francisco Trans March and Mission bar amid rising political tensions.

headline: Trump Picks Former Marine, Oklahoma Trooper Lance Schroyer As ICE Director
summary: President Donald Trump nominated former Oklahoma state trooper and U.S. Marine Lance Schroyer to serve as the next ICE director.
